since_last: 38% of 86 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +2.79%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 38% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.29% · BTC +2.77% · Gold -0.35% · Nasdaq100 -0.32%. 38% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +2.79%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +2.79%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -2.23%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +16.59%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +16.59%, VRT +4.22%, DLR +3.92%, NXPI +3.87%, MU +3.86%. Laggards: SPCX -8.98%, AVAV -8.59%, ARM -6.52%, GOOGL -6.01%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -8.98% at $168.38
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -8.98% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
